language.label: Interface Language
language.helper: Choose the language for menus, buttons, and labels in the app.

toast.extensionsAllFailed: All {{count}} extension update failed. Check the console for details.
toast.extensionsAllFailed_plural: All {{count}} extension updates failed. Check the console for details.
toast.extensionsPartial: {{updated}} updated, {{failed}} failed. Check the console for details.
toast.contextBudgetInvalid: Context size ({{max}}) is smaller than reserved response tokens — no history can fit. Raise Context Size or lower Max Tokens.
toast.contextFixedOverBudget: Fixed prompt overhead ({{fixed}} tokens) already exceeds the input budget by {{over}} tokens. Chat history is the only clip-eligible section, so reduce system/WI/preset content, raise Context Size, or lower Max Tokens.
toast.contextNoHistoryRoom: Fixed prompt overhead leaves no room for chat history. System prompt and other fixed blocks are not clipped; raise Context Size, lower Max Tokens, or shorten fixed prompt content.
toast.contextClipped: Clipped {{messages}} chat history message to fit the remaining history budget ({{tokens}} tokens dropped).
toast.contextClipped_plural: Clipped {{messages}} chat history messages to fit the remaining history budget ({{tokens}} tokens dropped).
toast.componentCrashed: Custom {{name}} crashed — falling back to default
